title: centaurea arenaria subsp. odessana
intro: Centaurea arenaria subsp. odessana, also known as Odessa knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea arenaria subsp. odessana include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of allergies, while also possessing antimicrobial properties that help in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
